title: Bluey Junior Dolls Stroller | Toy Dolls Buggy | Baby Doll Pushchair | Childrens Bluey Stroller Toy Easy Fold Umbrella Stroller | Role Play Dolls Pushchair | Ages 2+
features: 💙 Junior Dolls Pram – Lightweight, Foldable Umbrella Stroller for Dolls & Teddies 💙 Take your little one’s playtime to the next level with this adorable doll’s pram 🧸🍼! Perfect for toddlers, girls, and boys, this lightweight pushchair is designed for fun walks with their favourite doll, teddy, or reborn baby. Whether strolling through the garden 🌳, going on a pretend shopping trip 🛍️, or playing at home 🏡, this junior buggy makes role-play adventures come alive!

✨ Why Kids & Parents Love It ✨ ✔ Easy Folding Design – Compact umbrella-style stroller folds flat for quick storage – perfect for small spaces, holidays, or travel ✈️. ✔ Lightweight & Portable – Easy for little hands to push, carry, and store 🚗. ✔ Smooth Double Wheels – Four double wheels provide stability and smooth steering indoors or outdoors. ✔ Realistic Role-Play Fun – Helps children copy real-life parenting routines, just like a real pram or buggy 💕. ✔ Unisex Design – Great toy pram for boys, girls, toddlers, and kids aged 2+.

🎀 Product Features & Specifications 🎀 Includes: 1x Junior Doll’s Pram (doll not included) Handle Height: 53cm – perfect for toddlers & small children Fits Dolls: Up to 45cm (reborn, Baby Annabell, Tiny Tears, Cabbage Patch, bibi & more) Dimensions: H53cm x W26.5cm x D44.5cm Easy Fold: Umbrella-style stroller for compact storage and travel Age Suitability: 2 years+

🌈 Benefits of Pretend Play 🌈 Role play isn’t just fun – it’s an important part of learning and development 💡: Encourages creativity & imagination 🎨 Builds empathy & nurturing skills 💕 Helps children learn about themselves and others 👧👦 Develops confidence, coordination & problem-solving 🌟

🎁 Perfect Gift Idea 🎁 Looking for the perfect present? This toy stroller is an ideal: Birthday gift 🎂 Christmas surprise 🎄 Toddler role-play toy 🎉 Nursery accessory 🍼 Pair with other doll accessories like cots, cribs, highchairs, car seats, twin pushchairs, or shopping trolleys for the ultimate nursery playset collection 🧸.

🛒 Expand the Play World 🛒 This junior stroller is part of a wider toy range that includes strollers, prams, doll carriers, pushchairs, and role-play sets – perfect for imaginative kids who love adventures indoors and outdoors 🌍. ✅ Lightweight & Foldable 👜 ✅ Travel-Friendly ✈️ ✅ Encourages Learning Through Play 🌟
⭐ Give your child the joy of a realistic dolls pram – foldable, compact, and designed for endless pretend play adventures! ⭐
description: Product Description Introducing the Bluey Junior Stroller. A must have for a little one. The perfect toy pushchair for a stroll with your little ones favourite doll. Whether, walking through the park, on an adventure or even just playing around the house. Watch as your little one gets the chance to expand their nurturing and imagination skills throughout this creative play experience. Everything they need for hours of adventures. Playful & Fun Bluey Design! Our Bluey Junior Dolls Stroller is not just a toy; it's a portal to a world of make-believe and delightful adventures. Specially designed for the tiniest hands, this stroller is just the right size for your little one to take their beloved toys on a stroll through their imaginary world. Encourage Social & Cognitive Development It's a fantastic way for them to develop essential life skills while having hours of fun. Whether they're playing alone or with friends, it's a versatile toy that sparks creativity and fosters a love for caring and sharing. Does this come with the doll in the picture? No, It is the Bluey Junior Stroller only. Does this pram fold down? Yes, this pram folds flat for easy storage and transportation. What size dolls does this pram fit? This pram fits dolls up to 45cm (17 Inch) What is the item size? Product Dimensions - H53cm x W26.5cm x D44.5cm What age is the pram suitable for? Suitable for all children aged 3+. Hours Of Fun! Pretend Play Pretend-play is an essential part of early learning and the more your child engages in imaginative play, the more they expand their imagination and creativity. Lightweight & Foldable This Bluey Junior Stroller is a perfect toy for any household with limited space. This stroller is lightweight and may be easily stored in those tricky and restricted spaces thanks to its folding umbrella function. Bluey Range Bring the magic of Bluey to Play. Welcome to the world of Bluey, where imagination knows no bounds! From the heart-warming adventures of Bluey to the vibrant characters, our toys capture the essence of childhood joy and curiosity. Embrace the magic, laughter, and learning with the Bluey! Play just like mum with this playful stroller. Product Specification: Includes 1x Bluey Junior Dolls Stroller. Handle Height - 53cm. Fits dolls up to 45cm (Please note the doll is not included). Features an easy umbrella fold function. Product Dimensions - H53cm x W26.5cm x D44.5cm. Suitable for any children aged 2+.
